question: Quick question for Omega specifically: How should Codex/GPT be credited in git commits when Omega writes code via 'ao implement'? Currently we use 'Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <noreply@openai.com>' but is this the right name and email? Should it be 'OpenAI Codex', 'GPT Codex', 'Codex CLI', 'ChatGPT', or something else? What email? What does OpenAI officially recommend for AI-authored code attribution? Be concrete — give the exact line we should use.
